{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323152821FCE1AFD8ACA2C42B0125"}"},"total":1245},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7492799830320317246","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"人物描写生动鲜活，文笔流畅，情节紧凑是部好看的书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744559375,"group_id":"7455467184618228798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5jspra1sHAvW27ago7yXO07ek69VWsNqHTJUFsdF1ir","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1634337011017635","user_name":"新地岛的闻香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1634337011017635","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7455467184618228798","book_info":{"abstract":"【权谋】【智斗】【杀伐果断】【多女】【军统】【局座】
    大战爆发前夕，代号鬼狐的军统特工潜入十里洋场，组建暗杀队，制裁汉奸败类。
    沦陷期间，他曾打入特高课，以贵族身份，窃取情报，抢劫黄金、炸毁军火库。
    他也曾返回军统总部，破获敌方情报小组，查出内部鼹鼠。
    他还曾上过战场，指挥上万人与敌军血战。
    他被誉为，出身军统的指挥官，一代名将，令人闻风丧胆的情报头子，暗杀组织的缔造者。
    南造芸子评价：他是全世界最优秀的情报指挥官。
    贵族小姐评价：他是帝国最强大的勇士。
    伊藤太太评价：他每次出现都很神秘，走的时候也很神秘。
    戴老板评价：他虽是军统败类，是我的政敌，但他是江山社稷的栋梁。
    书香世家的小姐评价：他有崇高理想，有救亡图存的理念，有匡扶社稷的报负。
    他，一个令全世界情报机构闻风胆寒的东方男人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/43c1bc28c964a76156f041cf6966416a","author":"半事五成","author_id":"","book_id":"7455467184618228798","book_name":"谍战：我手下女特工全是绝色倾城","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a84830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":507,"name":"谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=507&name=谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":518,"name":"特工","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=518&name=特工&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7455467336066138686","read_count":"105320","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2272930"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"946","tags":"抗战谍战,都市,穿越,谍战,特工","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b0d88dee80a8eaf6bfd39284e8161c20~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434902&x-signature=GtO%2B1pAM%2FHUYTnYWXtCeIL17FKk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2946333114905854","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"259"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323152821FCE1AFD8ACA2C42B0125"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":158116,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":37521},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_a
